sourcePrompt: A PBR river patrol boat of the Brown Water Navy, about nine and a half meters of low fiberglass hull with no propellers - water-jet nozzles tuck under the flat stern. A circular gun tub sunk into the foredeck mounts twin .50 caliber machine guns; amidships an open conning station with a low windshield and a small radar mast. Low-poly, +X forward, ground at Y=0; named pivots for moving parts.
